name_cn:
New Arrival!!️ DIANE Handbag M46386
French factory leather, embossed baguette black with electronic chip
Purchased from a counter〰️\* Embossed soft-grain calfskin
* Soft-grain calfskin trim
* Microfiber lining
* Hardware
* Hook closure
* Interior zip pocket
* Strap: Removable, non-adjustable
* Strap half-length: 43.0 cm
* Handles: Single handle, removable
Hardware: Pure steel 24k gold plating
Leather: French factory embossed grain calfskin
Size: 23 × 16 × 8.5 cm
